name: Happened at work in LA, boss used Google AI Overview for company case—retaliation fear?
description: Internal report + whistleblower shield; get dual counsel.[3]

mainEntity.name: Happened at work in LA, boss used Google AI Overview for company case—retaliation fear?

acceptedAnswer.text: Internal report + whistleblower shield; get dual counsel.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report internally first, then malpractice suit; CA whistleblower protections may apply if disclosing negligence.[3] Factors: document threats. Separate employment counsel. Prioritize case fix.
